channel.title: 2026-06-07 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-06-07 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: PINNIES：面向积分算子问题的高效物理信息神经网络框架
item.description:
📚 ScienceDirect
该论文提出名为 PINNIES 的物理信息神经网络框架，用于求解或近似积分算子相关问题。工作可能关注计算效率、数值稳定性以及物理约束在神经网络中的嵌入方式。现有摘要主要为出版元数据，具体方法与验证结果需参考原文。

item.title: 用于预测赫斯勒合金磁热效应的可解释机器学习模型
item.description:
📚 ScienceDirect
该工作围绕赫斯勒合金中磁热效应的机器学习预测展开，重点在于模型的可解释性。研究可能旨在从材料特征与性能之间建立可理解的关联，以辅助筛选潜在高性能磁制冷材料。摘要信息较少，具体数据、模型细节和结论需查阅原文。

item.title: Quantum circuits help AI overcome memory limitations with minimal new parameters
item.description:
📚 Physics News
For millions of people, chatbots powered by large language models (LLMs) are now a key feature of everyday life. These AI systems are growing at a rapid pace, but scaling them up is becoming increasingly costly and resource-intensive.

item.title: Predictive surrogates could cut quantum computing measurement overhead by more than 99.97%
item.description:
📚 Physics News
Quantum computers, systems that process information leveraging quantum mechanical effects, have the potential of outperforming classical computers on some tasks. Despite their potential, the use of these systems remains very limited, due to their high cost and other challenges that have so far prevented their large-scale fabrication.
